commands.evidence: Returned 63188bcde2aa2ae68a6fede7790dfa76e7d0a6a4 instead of the packet target 63188bcda5855424b2db48f075397e0b938bb73b.
The packet target object exists but is not checked out.
The control-plane validator reports missing required artifact_probe and short baseline SHA in the packet; a result cannot both satisfy the result schema and bind to that malformed baseline.

findings.summary: The worktree HEAD differs from the immutable SHA required by the repair adversarial-review packet, so any behavioral review would be bound to the wrong target.
findings.remediation: Reconcile the intended final SHA, issue a corrected packet if necessary, and obtain a fresh packet-bound adversarial review before using adversarial evidence for the CC1 admission decision.

findings.summary: The packet omits required evidence.artifact_probe and uses an eight-character baseline SHA, so no strict pm-child-result/v1 can bind to it.
findings.remediation: Issue a schema-valid replacement packet with the full baseline SHA and artifact-probe binding, then obtain a fresh review against its immutable target.

claims_boundary: Blocked only by immutable packet-target drift. No assessment of the repaired validator, malformed-envelope rejection, additive compatibility, QA acceptance, hosted CI, external review, acceptance, PR state, merge, release, or readiness is claimed.
